hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit' || exit 0; RSPEC_OUT=$(docker-compose exec -T rails bundle exec rspec 2>&1) || { echo "$RSPEC_OUT" >&2; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"RSpec failed. Fix test failures before committing."}}'; exit 0; }; RSPEC_SUMMARY=$(echo "$RSPEC_OUT" | grep -E '^[0-9]+ examples?' | tail -1); RUBOCOP_OUT=$(docker-compose exec -T rails bundle exec rubocop 2>&1) || { echo "$RUBOCOP_OUT" >&2; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Rubocop failed. Fix lint violations before committing."}}'; exit 0; }; RUBOCOP_SUMMARY=$(echo "$RUBOCOP_OUT" | grep -E 'files? inspected' | tail -1); LINT_OUT=$(docker-compose exec -T next npm run lint 2>&1) || { echo "$LINT_OUT" >&2; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Next.js lint failed. Fix lint errors before committing."}}'; exit 0; }; SUMMARY="All checks passed. [RSpec] $RSPEC_SUMMARY [Rubocop] $RUBOCOP_SUMMARY [Lint] OK"; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"allow\",\"additionalContext\":\"$SUMMARY\"}}"; }
